LAW AND MOTION 302,DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED AND ITS ALTERNATIVE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO THE SECOND, FOURTH AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION FOR DENIAL OF REASONABLE ACCOMMODATION, FAILURE TO ENGAGE IN THE INTERACTIVE PROCESS AND WRONGFUL TERMINATION IN VIOLATION OF PUBLIC POLICY, AND DENIED AS TO THE FIRST AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION FOR DISABILITY DISCRIMINATION AND RETALIATION, FOR REASONS STATED ON THE RECORD. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER THAT REPEATS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM, AND SUBMIT IT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM; MTORREANO@SFTC.ORG.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Feb-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lisa Berkowitz, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, T:415.554.3825, for defendant/moving party;
John Henning, Esq. of Ladva Law Firm, T:415.296.8844, for plaintiff, on Court Call.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication, modified as follows:

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion for summary judgment is DENIED and its alternative motion for summary adjudication is GRANTED as to the second, fourth and FIFTH causes of action for denial of reasonable accommodation, failure to engage in the interactive process and wrongful termination in violation of public policy, and DENIED as to the first and third causes of action for disability discrimination and retaliation, for reasons stated on the record.

Counsel for defendant is to prepare a proposed order that repeats the Court's ruling, verbatim, and submit it in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2017 Set For Trial On Mar-12-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
